flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Motlow State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Motlow State Community College fell 29% between 2014 and 2017 ($4.9k → $3.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Motlow State Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (50.2% → 55.4%).
